name: Atelier SCRS Agent Network (StepB)
description: Atelier SCRS demo: atelier-broker (LLM, gpt-5-mini) -> 5 A2A worker agents (incident/legal/procurement/logistics/org on StepA shard d7gr5m, no-LLM) + MDM MCP tool. Broker-ful counterpart to scenario A1.

openai.apiKey.description: MuleSoft demos OpenAI proxy API key. Pass via deploy --property openai.apiKey:<base64(clientId:clientSecret)>.

ingressgw.url.description: Public Omni Ingress Gateway base URL (StepB / BetterTogetherDemo). Set via deploy --property.
